subcodes.title: Suriy-i-Vafa (=Lawh-i-Vafa)
subcodes.first_line: O Vafa! Render thanks unto thy Lord for having aided thee to embrace His Cause, enabled thee to recognize the Manifestation
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا وفاء ان اشکر ربک بما ایدک علی امره و عرفک مظهر نفسه و اقامک علی ثناء ذکره
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @heaven and paradise; heaven and hell, @return of the Manifestations of God, @meaning; importance of dreams and visions, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @chastisement and requital, @realms of being; three realms; five realms, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity
